metadata.title: Enrique Becerra — Web development for freelancers and SMBs
metadata.description: Tech Architect Lead specialized in Next.js, Sanity CMS and modern web architectures. I help freelancers and small businesses build a professional digital presence.

commands.gitBlame: all the good → enrique, all the bad → the coffee

about.title: A bit about me 📖
about.bio1: I'm a Tech Architect Leader with 8+ years of experience, specialized in Magnolia CMS, Java and Spring. I currently lead technical teams at VASS and coordinate the VassNolia guild at VASS University.
about.bio2: My work spans requirement gathering, analysis, estimation and end-to-end development, making sure technical objectives align with client needs. I've designed scalable templates and components in Magnolia, integrated systems via REST and modernized legacy through migrations — mostly for government and large corporate sectors.
about.bio3: Outside of work: geek, chronically curious, and someone who also knows there's life beyond the keyboard.

contact.title: Let's talk 💌
